title: Vaanathaiye Etti Pudippen Lyrics Vazhakku Enn 18/9
stanzas:
un kannakuli azhaginilthaan
en karpanaiya naan valarthen
un nenjukuli meethuthaandi
en nimmadhiya naan podhachchen

adi penne neeyum pen thaano
illai Bhramman seidha
silaithaano. (2)

manalil katti vaitha koattai
adhai mazhai vandhu
karaiththathenna.

enakkul katti vaitha koattai
adhai nee vandhu
udaithathenna.

ul nenjam enakkulle
ayyo un peyarai solgirathe
ennai vittu uyir pogum
andha uyir vandhu
unnai serum.

mezhugu pol uruginene
nee theeyaaga suttathinaal
neerinil moolgi kondu
naan neerukku alainthene

kan paartha paarvaigalai
un udhadugal poi sollalaam
kaanal neer kandathai
en idhayathil maraindhidumo

pulli vaithu kolam pottaal
nalla siththiram aagidumaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and longing, reflecting the emotional struggles of the characters in the movie.

What is the plot context of the movie?

Vazhakku Enn 18 explores complex relationships and societal issues, making the song's emotional depth even more impactful.

Who is the singer and music director?

The song is sung by Dhandapani and composed by Prasanna R.

When was the song released?

The song was released on May 4, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vaanathaiye Etti Pudippen, the protagonist expresses his deep feelings of love and yearning, encapsulating the essence of romance in a poignant manner. The song serves as a backdrop to the emotional turmoil faced by the characters in Vazhakku Enn 18, enhancing the narrative's depth. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing. This track is a perfect representation of the complexities of love, making it relatable to many.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaanathaiye Etti Pudippen from Vazhakku Enn 18 is a soulful melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Dhandapani's enchanting vocals and Prasanna R's captivating composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of romance. Dive into this musical journey that promises to tug at your heartstrings.
stanzaMeanings: I will rise up and circle the earth.
I will grow my dreams in the beauty of your eyes, and I have placed my peace on your heart.
Oh girl, are you a girl or not? Did Brahma create some confusion?
I will rise up and circle the earth.
What the rain has washed away from the sand that was built up.
What you broke from the bond I had inside me.
Oh heart, why do you speak your name? If you leave me, my life will go away, and that life will come to you.
I will live for you, girl, and I will wait for you.
I will rise up and circle the earth.
Like a melting ice, I have sunk; because of your fire, I have become wet and have drowned in the water.
The sights I see when I look at you, can I say they are false? Will the water I saw drown in my heart?
If I draw a pattern with a dot, will it become a good fortune?
I will rise up and circle the earth.
